basic_details.job_title: ESIC Assam Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 41 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Employees’ State Insurance Corporation Assam (ESIC Assam) Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 notification has been released on the official website. A total of 41 vacancies have been announced for Senior Resident posts under ESIC Assam Recruitment 2026.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Not exceeding 45 years as on the date of Document verification & Interview.
age_limit.details: The maximum age limit is 45 years as on the date of Document verification & Interview. Age relaxation rules will be applicable as per government norms.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS with Master Degree/Diploma in concerned departments/unit (desirable). MBBS with minimum 03 years experience also considered. For Anatomy, Physiology, Biochemistry & Statistics, PhD degree may be required.
qualification.details: Senior Resident (Sl No. 1-21): As per NMC guidelines (Gazette Notification No. CG-DL-E-05072025-264399 dated 30.06.2025) Senior Resident (Sl No. 9, 13, 19, 22-25): Master Degree/Diploma in concerned departments/unit (desirable) with minimum 03 years working experience in concerned departments/ unit. Senior Resident (Sl No. 9, 13, 19, 22 & 25) - Less than 03 years experience: MBBS with less than 03 years experience.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 67,700/- (Level 11) + Other Allowances* or Rs. 56,100/- (Level 10) + Other Allowances*
salary_details.details: Senior Resident: Fixed Basic Pay of Rs. 67,700/- (Level 11) + Other Allowances* (Approx. Rs. 139462) Senior Resident (with less than 03 years experience for specific posts): Fixed Basic Pay of Rs. 56,100/- (Level 10) + Other Allowances*

_labels.notification_pdf: Download ESIC Assam Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download ESIC Assam Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.employees_state_insurance_corporation_as: Rs. 67,700/- (Level 11) + Other Allowances* or Rs. 56,100/- (Level 10) + Other Allowances*

MBBS with Master Degree/Diploma in concerned departments/unit (desirable). MBBS with minimum 03 years experience also considered. For Anatomy, Physiology, Biochemistry & Statistics, PhD degree may be required.
Not exceeding 45 years as on the date of Document verification & Interview.

content_sections.heading: ESIC Assam Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the ESIC Assam Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download ESIC Assam Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ESIC Assam Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Senior Resident (Sl No. 1-21): As per NMC guidelines (Gazette Notification No. CG-DL-E-05072025-264399 dated 30.06.2025) Senior Resident (Sl No. 9, 13, 19, 22-25): Master Degree/Diploma in concerned departments/unit (desirable) with minimum 03 years working experience in concerned departments/ unit. Senior Resident (Sl No. 9, 13, 19, 22 & 25) - Less than 03 years experience: MBBS with less than 03 years experience.

content_sections.heading: ESIC Assam Application Fee 2026
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: ESIC Assam Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: The maximum age limit is 45 years as on the date of Document verification & Interview. Age relaxation rules will be applicable as per government norms.

content_sections.heading: ESIC Assam Salary / Stipend 2026
content_sections.text: Senior Resident: Fixed Basic Pay of Rs. 67,700/- (Level 11) + Other Allowances* (Approx. Rs. 139462) Senior Resident (with less than 03 years experience for specific posts): Fixed Basic Pay of Rs. 56,100/- (Level 10) + Other Allowances*

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for ESIC Assam Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies for Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 41 vacancies announced for the Senior Resident positions in ESIC Assam.

faq.question: Q2. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to appear for a walk-in interview with all required documents.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The salary offered is a Fixed Basic Pay of Rs. 67,700/- (Level 11) + Other Allowances* or Rs. 56,100/- (Level 10) + Other Allowances*.

faq.question: Q4. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 09-07-2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the maximum age limit for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 45 years as on the date of Document verification & Interview.

faq.question: Q6. What are the essential qualifications required for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: Qualifications include MBBS with a Master Degree/Diploma in concerned departments/unit (desirable). For specific science departments, a PhD degree may be required.

faq.question: Q7. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at ESIC Assam, Guwahati, Assam, 781022.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original testimonials and one self-attested copy of each, including ID proof, educational certificates, and experience certificates.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these Senior Resident positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these Senior Resident positions is Contractual.
